invariants.name: No orphan active initiatives
invariants.description: Active initiatives must have at least one dependency edge.

invariants.name: No dependency cycles
invariants.description: Initiative dependency graph must be acyclic.

invariants.name: Minimum dependencies
invariants.description: Initiatives should declare at least one dependency.

invariants.name: Constitutional basis required
invariants.description: Initiatives should link to a constitutional basis.
